behavior_in_task_description.reason: All test assertions (DatabaseFilter fields, ListDatabasesRequest JSON parsing, DATABASE_DEFAULT_COLUMNS import, DatabaseError.create timezone, _humanize_timestamp, app.py 'charts/dashboards/databases' and 'My databases:' strings, field_validator/parse_json_or_list/parse_json_or_model_list re-exports) are explicitly named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what's broken and expected behavior without stating exact code changes or line edits.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests verify behavior (parse results, timezone-aware output) and some literal strings that are explicitly required by the instruction itself ('charts/dashboards/databases', 'My databases:'), so alternative correct fixes would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute imports and call functions like DatabaseFilter(), ListDatabasesRequest(), DatabaseError.create(), _humanize_timestamp() via subprocess.

test_not_tautological.reason: Stubs can't satisfy JSON string parsing into structured objects, timezone-aware timestamp generation, and humanize outputs containing 'hour'/'ago'.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Each of the six issues in instruction.md has corresponding test coverage.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names, docstrings, and a section header comment for fail-to-pass tests.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is code fixes, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and names look consistent between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction identifies modules/functions at an appropriate level (e.g., 'DatabaseFilter', '_humanize_timestamp') without pointing to exact lines.
